name: 未來記憶倒敘鉤
description: 女主擁有前世記憶，知道家族滅亡的結局，觀眾被『能否改變命運』這一終極懸念牢牢抓住。每次她透露前世信息，都會引發新的緊張感。

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: No wonder the real heiress suffered from depression in her past life. / He died in the end. / My daughter is dead? / Is Xixi really going to die?
